text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You look just like a forlorn swan, gone astray in
the lake. Would you like to talk about what's on
your mind?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's nothing you need to worry about.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That can't be true. I found you absorbed in your
thoughts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Did you run a lackluster race? Are you having
trouble improving your time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I understand the urge to turn a blind eye to your
problems, but bottling them up won't change a
thing!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No, it's really not that serious!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Say it loud and clear! Life's a stage, and you can
change the script with a single word!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I was just deciding if I should have curry or pasta
for lunch!
